_comment: See ADDING_TALENT_AFFIXES.md for the authoring guide.
IDs 41 and 100-119 reserved for Rogue Combat.
All entries use class='ROGUE', spell_family='ROGUE', spec_tree=1.
Entries with all-ones flags [4294967295, 4294967295, 4294967295] skip flag verification.
Run build_talent_affixes.ps1 (or update_affixes.bat) after any edits.

_notes.talent_description: Increases the duration of Gouge by 0.5 seconds per rank.
_notes.affix_effect: Each bonus rank adds 500ms (0.5s) to Gouge's duration on top of the character's talents.
_notes.scaling: Linear. value_per_rank=500 (ms) FLAT. A 3-rank roll adds +1.5s total.
_notes.implementation: Pattern 1 — specific spell. family_flags must match Gouge's SpellClassMask. DURATION FLAT values are in ms.

talent_affixes.name: Improved Gouge
talent_affixes.notes: Gouge duration +0.5s (500ms) per bonus rank. flags=0x00000008=8 confirmed via .spellinfo all 1776

talent_affixes.name: Improved Sinister Strike
talent_affixes.notes: flags=[2,0,0]=mask0 bit1. SinisterStrike(1752) confirmed SPELLFAMILY_ROGUE. Energy cost -3/rank. WotLK: 2r at -3/-6. Moved from cross-tree main file (pre-spec-split id).

_todo.talent_description: Increases the damage done by your offhand weapon by 10% per rank.
_todo.why_not_implemented: Affects passive offhand autoattack damage — not a castable spell with SpellFamilyFlags. Autoattack is not dispatched through the SpellMod system.
_todo.future_path: Hook OnMeleeAttack with offhand swing check. Apply a damage multiplier of (1 + rank*0.1) to the offhand damage roll in Unit::MeleeDamageBonus or Unit::CalcDamage.

_notes.talent_description: Increases the duration granted by Slice and Dice by 15% per rank (to a max of +45%).
_notes.affix_effect: Each bonus rank adds another +15% to the Slice and Dice buff duration.
_notes.scaling: Linear. value_per_rank=15 PCT. A 3-rank roll gives +45% duration on top of talents.
_notes.implementation: Pattern 1 — specific spell. family_flags must match Slice and Dice's SpellClassMask. DURATION PCT is a percentage of the spell's base duration.

talent_affixes.name: Improved Slice and Dice
talent_affixes.notes: Slice and Dice duration +15% per bonus rank. flags=0x00040000=262144 confirmed via .spellinfo all 5171

_todo.talent_description: Increases your chance to parry an attack by 1% per rank.
_todo.why_not_implemented: Parry rating is a character stat, not a SpellMod. The talent affix system only supports SpellModifier objects. Parry bonuses require ApplyRatingMod / HandleStatFlatModifier, which are currently only in the generic (stat) affix path.
_todo.future_path: Extend ApplyTalentAffixes to support a stat-bonus fallback. Or add as a class-specific stat affix in rogue.json.

_todo.talent_description: Increases your chance to hit with melee and ranged weapons by 1% per rank.
_todo.why_not_implemented: Hit rating is a character stat, not a SpellMod. Same limitation as Deflection.
_todo.future_path: Extend ApplyTalentAffixes to support stat bonuses, or add as a class-specific stat affix.

_notes.talent_description: Reduces the cooldown of your Sprint and Evasion abilities by 45 seconds per rank.
_notes.affix_effect: Two separate entries — one for Sprint, one for Evasion. Each bonus rank reduces that ability's cooldown by 45 seconds.
_notes.scaling: Linear. value_per_rank=-45000 (ms) FLAT. A 2-rank roll gives -90s CDR on Sprint or Evasion.
_notes.implementation: Pattern 1 — two entries because Sprint and Evasion almost certainly have different SpellClassMask bits. COOLDOWN FLAT values are in milliseconds, negative = reduction.

talent_affixes.name: Endurance (Sprint)
talent_affixes.notes: Sprint cooldown -45s per bonus rank. flags=0x00000040=64 confirmed via .spellinfo all 2983

talent_affixes.name: Endurance (Evasion)
talent_affixes.notes: Evasion cooldown -45s per bonus rank. flags=0x00000020=32 confirmed via .spellinfo all 5277

_todo.talent_description: A strike that becomes active after parrying an enemy attack. Deals weapon damage plus bonus damage and disarms the target for 6 seconds.

_notes.talent_description: Increases the damage of your Sinister Strike, Backstab, and Eviscerate abilities by 2% per rank.
_notes.affix_effect: Single entry with OR'd flags covering all three abilities. Each bonus rank adds +2% damage to all three.
_notes.scaling: Linear. value_per_rank=2 PCT. A 3-rank roll gives +6% damage to Sinister Strike, Backstab, and Eviscerate.
_notes.flags: Combined using UNIQUE bits only (bit 23=0x00800000 excluded — shared by SS/Backstab/Eviscerate/Ambush/Hemorrhage): SS unique bit1(0x2) | Backstab unique bit2(0x4) | Eviscerate unique bit17(0x20000) = 0x00020006 = 131078.
_notes.implementation: Pattern 1. All component flags confirmed. Using unique bits only to prevent false-positive matches on Ambush and other spells sharing bit 23.

talent_affixes.name: Aggression
talent_affixes.notes: SS+Backstab+Eviscerate damage +2% per bonus rank. flags=0x00020006=131078 (unique bits: SS bit1|Backstab bit2|Eviscerate bit17). Bit 23 excluded — shared by Ambush/Hemorrhage.
talent_affixes.verify_command: N/A — derived from flags confirmed in Assassination session

_todo.talent_description: Your attacks have a 1% per rank chance to stun the target when using a Mace.
_todo.why_not_implemented: Stun-on-hit is a proc triggered by autoattack or ability hits, not a SpellMod. Requires a custom OnHit hook with weapon type check and a CastSpell call to apply the stun debuff.
_todo.future_path: Hook OnMeleeAttack with mace weapon type check. Roll rank×1% chance; if success, cast the stun spell on the target.

_todo.talent_description: Increases your attack speed by 20% and causes each of your attacks to also strike a nearby enemy. Lasts 15 seconds.
Gives your successful offhand weapon strikes a 20% chance to restore 15 energy.
_todo.why_not_implemented: Proc on offhand weapon strike — not a SpellMod. Requires hooking the offhand melee hit event and granting energy on a probability roll.
_todo.future_path: Hook OnMeleeAttack for offhand strikes. Roll rank×20% chance; if success, call Player::ModifyPower(POWER_ENERGY, 15).

_todo.talent_description: Gives you a 5% per rank chance to get an extra attack after hitting with your sword.
_todo.why_not_implemented: Extra attack proc on weapon hit — not a SpellMod. Requires hooking the melee swing event with a sword weapon type check.
_todo.future_path: Hook OnMeleeAttack with sword-type check. Roll rank×5% chance; if success, trigger an extra attack via Unit::HandleProcExtraAttackFor.

_todo.talent_description: Increases your chance to get an extra attack when using swords or axes.
_todo.why_not_implemented: Extra attack proc on weapon hit — same limitation as Sword Specialization. Not a SpellMod.
_todo.future_path: Same as Sword Specialization but expanded to sword and axe weapon types.

_todo.talent_description: Increases your Energy regeneration rate by 8/16/25% per rank.
_todo.why_not_implemented: Energy regeneration rate is a base character attribute, not a SpellMod. Requires modifying the player's energy regen multiplier via a path not currently exposed in the talent affix system.
_todo.future_path: Extend ApplyTalentAffixes with an ENERGY_REGEN bonus type. On equip, multiply the player's base energy regen by (1 + accumulated_bonus). Track separately so RemoveTalentAffixes can undo it cleanly.

_todo.talent_description: Increases your Energy regeneration rate by 100% for 15 seconds.
Reduces the duration of Stun and Fear effects used against you by 15/30%.
_todo.why_not_implemented: Incoming CC duration reduction is not a SpellMod on the player's own spells. Requires hooking the aura application path to shorten incoming stun/fear debuff durations.
_todo.future_path: Hook OnAuraApply for the player. When a stun or fear mechanic aura is applied, reduce its duration by rank×15%.

_todo.talent_description: Increases your Dodge chance by 1% per rank.
_todo.why_not_implemented: Dodge is a character stat, not a SpellMod. Same limitation as Deflection and Precision.
_todo.future_path: Extend ApplyTalentAffixes to support stat bonuses.

_todo.talent_description: Your Eviscerate, Rupture, and Envenom reduce the remaining cooldown of your Adrenaline Rush, Killing Spree, and Sprint by 2 seconds per combo point spent per rank.
_todo.why_not_implemented: Triggered CDR — fires when a finisher is cast and counts the combo points spent. Not a static SpellMod. Requires hooking the finisher cast event, reading the combo points consumed, and reducing the cooldowns of three specific spells.
_todo.future_path: Hook OnSpellCast for Eviscerate/Rupture/Envenom. Read Player::GetComboPoints() at cast time, then call Player::ReduceSpellCooldown for Adrenaline Rush, Killing Spree, and Sprint by rank × 2000ms × combo_points.

_notes.talent_description: Increases your total physical damage by 2% per rank. Also reduces the armor of targets you apply a physical bleed to by 2% per rank.
_notes.affix_effect: Implements only the flat physical damage bonus (+2% per rank). The armor reduction on bleed targets requires an aura-on-debuff-application hook and is skipped.
_notes.scaling: Linear. value_per_rank=2 PCT. All-ones mask — applies to all Rogue spells (slight overreach, acceptable).
_notes.implementation: Pattern 2 — all-ones mask. Simplification: all Rogue abilities gain +2% damage, not just physical abilities. Armor reduction half is omitted.

talent_affixes.name: Savage Combat
talent_affixes.notes: All Rogue damage +2% per bonus rank (simplified — skips armor reduction debuff). All-ones mask, carrier 1752 confirmed Rogue family.

_todo.talent_description: When you hit a target with less health percentage than you, your damage dealt is increased by 4% per rank for 10 seconds.
_todo.why_not_implemented: Conditional damage bonus based on relative HP percentages — not a static SpellMod. Requires a per-hit HP comparison and conditional temporary aura application.
_todo.future_path: Hook OnMeleeAttack or OnSpellHit. Compare target.GetHealthPct() < player.GetHealthPct(); if true, apply or refresh a short-duration DAMAGE PCT aura scaled to rank×4%.

_todo.talent_description: Step through the shadows from enemy to enemy, attacking each for 2 seconds.
